# bzip2

```go
import "compress/bzip2"
```

Package bzip2 implements bzip2 decompression.

<a name="NewReader"></a>

## func [NewReader](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/compress/bzip2/bzip2.go#L46>)

```go
func NewReader(r io.Reader) io.Reader
```

NewReader returns an [io.Reader](<https://pkg.go.dev/io/#Reader>) which decompresses bzip2 data from r. If r does not also implement [io.ByteReader](<https://pkg.go.dev/io/#ByteReader>), the decompressor may read more data than necessary from r.

<a name="StructuralError"></a>

## type [StructuralError](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/compress/bzip2/bzip2.go#L17>)

A StructuralError is returned when the bzip2 data is found to be syntactically invalid.

```go
type StructuralError string
```
